title: What brotherhood actually looks like
caption:
You have 400 followers and no one to call at midnight.

That's not community. Most men are surrounded and completely unknown. They share "struggles" in small group while the actual sin stays private. They text their accountability partner once a month and call it brotherhood. They've never had a man look them in the face and say: I know what you're doing and I'm not going anywhere.

The fellowship Scripture describes is costly, in-person, and uncomfortable. Two or three men who have access to the version of you no one else sees — that's the thing you're looking for.

Start with one man.

#faith #brotherhood #christianmen #accountability #godlymen #manofgod #christianity
